title: smilax jacquinii
intro: Smilax jacquinii, also known as the Mexican sarsaparilla, is a type of flowering vine native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its saponins and flavonoids content. The health benefits of Smilax jacquinii include its potential to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Smilax jacquinii is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be made into a salve or cream for topical application.
